## Entities.Session.IPersistedFillingSession interface

Persisted filling editing session with full editing state.

Contains the complete undo/redo history so the session can be restored to its exact editing state.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IPersistedFillingSession extends IPersistedSessionBase 
```
**Extends:** IPersistedSessionBase
